holdings.infoBox: INDS is an equity ETF with a total of 30 individual holdings. The top holdings are Prologis stock at 16.07%, Public Storage at 15.69%, Extra Space Storage at 15.29%, W. P. Carey at 4.56%, and SEGRO at 4.36%.

overview.description: The Pacer Industrial Real Estate ETF (INDS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund tracks an index of developed market companies that derive at least 85% of their revenue from industrial real estate activities. INDS was launched on May 14, 2018 and is issued by Pacer.
